series_metadata.series_description: Infant High Risk Questionnaire & Infant Hearing Assessment Reporting Form. In re: State Infant Hearing Screening & Assess- ment Program. Information gathered & maintained for purpose of data analysis on retrospective, as well as prospective longitudina

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain 2 years, then destroy ; Paper: Maintain questionnaire and Hearing Assessment Reporting form until information is tabulated/entered, then destroy. Maintain the final report for 3 years then destroy if of no historical value to State Archives, Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Other
